slot_binding.comment: Source-Media-derived smart crop wins when a post is the entry point (post → product match → smart crop sized for this slot's ratio). Catalog stock (product.image) is the final fallback when no source Media exists — e.g. running on a manual-upload-only catalog row. Crop is the renderer's responsibility (Cloudinary so_/c_crop transforms when the URL is Cloudinary, object-fit: cover otherwise).

fallback_policy.if_video_missing_poster: generate from first frame or fall back to image

panel_bg.comment: right-side content panel for landscape variants — leads with source-Media's dominant tone so the panel reads as an extension of the image

panel_text_color.comment: panel-attached secondary text (eyebrow, badges) reads this; renderer derives readable B/W against the resolved panel_bg via tpReadableOn. Catches white-on-cream when palette_dominant is light.

headline_text_color.comment: image-led: vibrant image color when one exists. For monochromatic palettes (all entries within VIBRANT_MIN_SATURATION of grey), palette_vibrant emits null and the headline defaults to white — never falls through to palette_accent (which is just palette[1] and reads close to the dark panel) nor brand.accent_color (image-led templates intentionally don't substitute brand color for an image color).

proof_bar_bg.comment: renderer applies an 8% white lift via color-mix so the bar is visually distinct from the panel without needing a separate palette slot

cta_button_bg.comment: Image-led: vibrant image color when one passes the saturation+contrast gates. Otherwise brand accent or default orange — NEVER palette_accent (palette[1] is dominance-ranked and can be a near-white off-tone that washes out white CTA text).

font_family_headline.comment: responsive: brand-curated display font wins. Falls through to the brushy display stack.

font_family_body.comment: fixed Inter-style sans for everything except the headline. Per the reference creative's typography.

slot_binding.comment: Source-Media-derived smart crop wins. 4:5 source crop is the hero across all ratios — Cloudinary c_fill,g_auto smart-crops to whatever rect the canvas asks for.

fallback_policy.if_video_missing_poster: generate from first frame or fall back to image

panel_bg.comment: split-panel content surface — leads with source-Media's dominant tone so the panel reads as an extension of the image

panel_text_color.comment: panel-attached secondary text (eyebrow, badges) reads this; renderer derives readable B/W against the resolved panel_bg via tpReadableOn. Catches white-on-cream when palette_dominant is light.

headline_text_color.comment: image-led: vibrant image color when one exists. Monochromatic palettes default to white.

cta_button_bg.comment: Image-led: vibrant image color when one passes the saturation+contrast gates. Otherwise brand accent or default orange — NEVER palette_accent (palette[1] is dominance-ranked and can be a near-white off-tone that washes out white CTA text).

fallback_policy.if_no_video_or_image: replace center_hero with brand color block
fallback_policy.if_only_one_quote: repeat as primary and secondary style variants disabled

fallback_policy.if_only_one_metric: duplicate layout disabled, use stacked single stat mode

background_binding.comment: Source media fills the entire canvas — image is the ad. The first three are source-Media-derived smart crops; product.image is the catalog stock fallback (direct CatalogProduct.imageUrl) so brands with only manual-upload catalog rows still render.

rights_gate.comment: When background_binding resolves to ugc.media, the rights flag must be true. Otherwise the resolution falls through to the next source_priority entry (product.hero_media → creator.portrait_media → ugc.media).

panel_bg.comment: right-side content panel — leads with the source Media's dominant background color so the panel reads as an extension of the image

headline_text_color.comment: image-led: vibrant image color when one passes the saturation+contrast gates. Otherwise white. NEVER falls through to palette_accent or brand.accent_color (image-led overlay shouldn't substitute brand color for an image color).

accent_border_color.comment: left-edge accent on quote card + section header underline

section_header_color.comment: uppercase section eyebrow color (e.g. 'BUILT FOR HEAT LOVERS')

font_family_headline.comment: brand-curated headline font wins; falls through to a clean sans default.

headline_chip_bg.comment: dark-gray chip backing behind the headline text — semi-opaque so it lifts white text off any image background without competing with the photo.

quote_chip_bg.comment: matches headline_chip_bg — dark-gray chip behind quote text.

background_binding.comment: Source media fills the entire canvas — image is the ad. The first three are source-Media-derived smart crops; product.image is the catalog stock fallback (direct CatalogProduct.imageUrl) so brands with only manual-upload catalog rows still render.

rights_gate.comment: When background_binding resolves to ugc.media, the rights flag must be true. Otherwise the resolution falls through to the next source_priority entry (product.hero_media → creator.portrait_media → ugc.media).

panel_bg.comment: right-side content panel — leads with the source Media's dominant background color so the panel reads as an extension of the image

headline_text_color.comment: image-led: vibrant image color when one passes the saturation+contrast gates. Otherwise white. NEVER falls through to palette_accent or brand.accent_color (image-led overlay shouldn't substitute brand color for an image color).

accent_border_color.comment: left-edge accent on quote card + section header underline

section_header_color.comment: uppercase section eyebrow color (e.g. 'BUILT FOR HEAT LOVERS')

font_family_headline.comment: brand-curated headline font wins; falls through to a clean sans default.

headline_chip_bg.comment: dark-gray chip backing behind the headline text — semi-opaque so it lifts white text off any image background without competing with the photo.

motion_policy.if_creator_and_product_are_both_video: autoplay creator_zone only, render product_zone as poster or tap-to-play secondary

fallback_policy.if_no_creator_media: use product media as primary and convert template to simplified endorsement mode
fallback_policy.if_no_product_media: render product name and badges only
